metadata.scope_note: Nigeria v1 sector overlay pack. Use together with nigeria_core_control_library for baseline privacy, cybersecurity, governance, evidence, and human-review controls.
metadata.versioning_note: This is a frozen starter snapshot. Do not mutate after use in reports; publish v2025_02 or later for changes.

official_sources_consulted.name: CBN Regulatory Framework for Mobile Payments Services in Nigeria
CBN Operational Rules and Regulations for Nigeria Central Switch

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Nigerian laws, regulations, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.

rules.title: Payment service provider licence category is evidenced
rules.summary: Payment-platform documents should evidence the relevant CBN payment-service licence category, approval, or regulated status.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Transaction switching/processing obligations are documented
rules.summary: Switching or processing documents should evidence transaction switching, processing controls, settlement responsibilities, or participant obligations.

source_basis: CBN Operational Rules and Regulations for the Nigeria Central Switch
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Mobile-money scheme registration or scheme-code evidence is present
rules.summary: Mobile-money scheme documents should evidence scheme registration, scheme code, wallet/customer registration, or mobile-money operating controls.

source_basis: CBN Regulatory Framework for Mobile Payments Services in Nigeria
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Payment-system risk and information-security controls are present
rules.summary: Payment platforms should evidence payment-system risk, information security, access control, incident response, or security monitoring.

source_basis: CBN Payments System Risk and Information Security Management Framework materials
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Electronic payment channel control evidence is present
rules.summary: Payment-channel documents should evidence authentication, transaction validation, channel controls, or fraud monitoring.

source_basis: CBN payment-channel guidelines and electronic banking materials
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Customer payment-data privacy and confidentiality are documented
rules.summary: Payment-platform documents should evidence privacy, personal-data handling, confidentiality, retention, or lawful disclosure controls.

source_basis: NDPC Nigeria Data Protection Act GAID 2025
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Payment transaction monitoring or AML escalation is referenced
rules.summary: Payment platforms should evidence transaction monitoring, AML controls, suspicious transaction escalation, or customer due diligence.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Merchant/customer dispute and complaints handling is documented
rules.summary: Payment-platform documents should evidence customer complaints, merchant dispute handling, refunds, chargebacks, or redress procedures.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Settlement, reconciliation, and exception handling are documented
rules.summary: Payment-platform documents should evidence settlement, reconciliation, exception handling, failed transaction handling, or dispute timelines.

source_basis: CBN payments system rules and regulations
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Open banking/API provider obligations are evidenced where applicable
rules.summary: Open banking, API, or payment-data sharing documents should evidence API governance, participant registration, customer consent, or data-sharing controls.

source_basis: CBN Operational Guidelines for Open Banking in Nigeria
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Corporate registration and regulated operating identity are present
rules.summary: Payment-platform documents should reference company registration, RC number, incorporation, or formal regulated entity identity.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.
